source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent three-quarter porch swing on warm drawing paper.

process_strategy: The contact sheet builds one hanging bench from a light seat box and back guide through the bench, arms, chains, cushion, slats, restrained color, and final graphite cleanup.

final_elements.name: seat box, back, and chain guides
final_elements.description: A light three-quarter seat box, tall back guide, and two faint chain pairs.

final_elements.name: wooden bench silhouette
final_elements.description: A settled wooden bench back and seat inside the guides.

final_elements.name: armrests and front supports
final_elements.description: Two simple arms with short supports under them.

final_elements.name: seat cushion and back slats
final_elements.description: A soft rectangular cushion and evenly spaced wooden slats.

final_elements.name: pale teal cushion tint, wood tone, and floor shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained color on established forms with a soft shadow below.

frames.visible_job: Places the seat box, tall back, and faint chain guides in three-quarter view.
introduces: seat box, back, and chain guides

frames.visible_job: Builds the wooden bench silhouette inside the established guides.
requires_prior_elements: seat box, back, and chain guides

frames.visible_job: Adds two armrests and their front supports to the established bench.
requires_prior_elements: seat box, back, and chain guides

frames.visible_job: Adds the cushion and separated slats inside the existing bench.
requires_prior_elements: seat box, back, and chain guides

frames.visible_job: Adds pale color and a soft floor shadow to established shapes.
introduces: pale teal cushion tint, wood tone, and floor shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established contours, chains, slats, cushion color, wood tone, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No chain, armrest, support, slat, cushion, tint, or shadow may first appear in the final image.
The swing must retain one three-quarter angle, scale, and chain placement across all frames.
No late panel may add porch architecture, plants, pillows, or decorative carving.
